articles.title: Mercedes withdraw Right of Review request over Monaco result
articles.summary: Mercedes have announced that they have withdrawn their Right of Review request over the results of the Monaco Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Fred Vasseur has explained how he will be trying to keep Ferrari “calm” as the 2026 campaign develops, after Lewis Hamilton’s breakthrough win for the team generated talk of a championship challenge.

articles.title: Where Hamilton now ranks among the oldest GP winners
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton recently secured his maiden Grand Prix victory with Ferrari at the age of 41 – who does he join on the list of oldest race winners?

articles.title: Mercedes reveal unusual issue that impacted Russell in Spain
articles.summary: Mercedes have shared how George Russell was battling a “very, very oversteery” car in the closing stages of the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, due to an “incorrect” balance adjustment during his final pit stop.

articles.title: Lia Block fez história no automobilismo norte-americano
